records.summary: A listing page showing two upcoming yoga retreats near Berlin — 'Be the Leaf' in March 2026 and 'Where We Bloom' in April/May — with brief details and separate booking links for each.
records.retreatName: Multiple retreats listed (Be the Leaf; Where We Bloom)
records.where: Be the Leaf: Haven Havelland, 90 min from Berlin; Where We Bloom: Haus Erlengrund, Buckow (Märkische Schweiz)
records.when: Be the Leaf: March 12–15, 2026; Where We Bloom: April 30 – May 3
records.price: Be the Leaf: not shown on page; Where We Bloom: see external link (early bird until Feb 14)
records.notes: Two retreats are mixed on one listing page with no pricing shown inline, no included amenities listed, no daily schedule, and prices require clicking off to external pages — hurting both conversion and SEO.
